hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && { command -v poetry >/dev/null 2>&1 && find . -name '*.py' -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './.*' | grep -q . && poetry run pytest -q 2>&1 | tail -5 || echo '[harness] pytest skipped (bootstrap: no source code or poetry not installed yet)'; }

INPUT=$(cat); [ "$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active')" = "true" ] && exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && ./init.sh > /tmp/rjp_harness_init.log 2>&1 && echo '[harness] init.sh OK' || (echo '[harness] init.sh FAILED — see /tmp/rjp_harness_init.log' && tail -20 /tmp/rjp_harness_init.log && exit 2)
